name: stranger-things-s5-finale-sentiment
title: Stranger Things Season 5 Finale: Sentiment and Fan Theories
description: A collection of 74 Reddit-sourced discussions and AI-analyzed sentiments regarding the series finale of Stranger Things. Includes intensity scores, key emotions, and structured fan theories.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License

fields.name: fan_theories
fields.description: List of structured theories including title, theory description, and plausibility score.

fields.name: discussions
fields.description: Aggregated Reddit threads with embedded sentiment analysis (sentiment, intensity, emotion) and thematic tags.

fields.name: sentiment_summary
fields.description: The count of positive vs mixed sentiments found in the crawl.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Crawl date, total sources, and model used for analysis.
